result.summary: bed-and-breakfast.it exposes a public MCP server at https://tools.bed-and-breakfast.it/mcp; no public developer HTTP/GraphQL APIs or CLI were found.
result.description: Bed-and-Breakfast.it is an accommodation search and booking platform focused on properties across Italy. It lets travelers browse listings, availability, pricing, and booking information for bed and breakfasts and other lodging types.

evidence: Catalog fact: Known MCP server from openai registries at https://tools.bed-and-breakfast.it/mcp (authTypes: NONE)
